visual_dna: Does the output utilize high-fidelity 3D rendering with soft volumetric lighting?
Are proportions exaggerated into chubby, cute, oversized-head formats?
Does the material feature dense, stylized fur or soft tactile surfaces?
product_logic: Is the silhouette cleanly separated using cinematic rim lighting?
Do the props/accessories integrate softly without breaking the organic 3D aesthetic?
technical_excellence: Is the fur/hair rendered with high texel density while maintaining stylized structural clumps?
Are there soft ambient occlusion shadows grounding the volumes?
